chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/256)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/256)
text: لَا يَكُونُ الظِّهَارُ إِلَّا عَلَى مِثْلِ مَوْضِعِ الطَّلَاقِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Fazzal, from the one who informed him,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The Zahaar does not happen except upon the similar place of the divorce’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ibn Faddal has narrated from the one who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Al-Zihar can take place only in the environment of divorce.’”
